perturbation.original_text: Without limiting the generality of the foregoing, in the event that a Possible Transaction is not consummated neither you nor your representatives shall use any of the Evaluation Materials for any purpose. You will be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by your representatives.
perturbation.changed_text: Without limiting the generality of the foregoing, in the event that a Possible Transaction is not consummated neither you nor your representatives shall use any of the Evaluation Materials. You will be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by your representatives.
perturbation.explanation: The removal of the phrase 'for any purpose' makes the sentence incomplete and contradicts the earlier definition. The sentence now states they shall not use any of Evaluation Materials, making it unclear on for what they can not use the Evaluation Material, which contradicts the specific use case mentioned earlier.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You will treat confidentially any information (whether written or oral) that either the Company or its representatives furnish to you in connection with a Possible Transaction involving the Company. You recognize and acknowledge the confidential and non-public nature of the Evaluation Materials, the competitive value of the Evaluation Materials, and the damage that could result to the Company if the Evaluation Materials were used or disclosed except as authorized by this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that in the event of a non-consummated transaction, the recipient could not use the evaluation materials 'for any purpose'. The changed text removes 'for any purpose', making the restriction overly broad and unclear. The contradicted text states that the Evaluation Materials are confidential, non-public, and that damage could result if used or disclosed 'except as authorized by this Agreement'. The removal of 'for any purpose' now creates an ambiguity because it's unclear what is authorized, thus creating a contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Other than with respect to those Evaluation Materials you have been advised by counsel are required to be disclosed under applicable securities laws, in the event that you or any of your representatives receive a request or are required (by deposition, interrogatory, request for documents, subpoena, civil investigative demand or similar process) to disclose all or any part of the Evaluation Materials, you or your representatives, as the case may be, agree to (i) immediately notify the Company of the existence, terms and circumstances surrounding such a request, (ii) consult with the Company on the advisability of taking legally available steps to resist or narrow such request and (iii) assist the Company in seeking a protective order or other appropriate remedy.
perturbation.changed_text: In the event that you or any of your representatives receive a request or are required (by deposition, interrogatory, request for documents, subpoena, civil investigative demand or similar process) to disclose all or any part of the Evaluation Materials, you or your representatives, as the case may be, agree to (i) immediately notify the Company of the existence, terms and circumstances surrounding such a request, (ii) consult with the Company on the advisability of taking legally available steps to resist or narrow such request and (iii) assist the Company in seeking a protective order or other appropriate remedy.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'Other than with respect to those Evaluation Materials you have been advised by counsel are required to be disclosed under applicable securities laws' the sentence now demands compliance with this section even when counsel requires disclosure by law. Which contradicts the intention that was to follow legal advice, hence creating in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You will not use any of the Evaluation Materials for any purpose. You and your representatives will keep the Evaluation Materials completely confidential; provided, however, that (i) any of such information may only be disclosed to ----------------- those of your directors, officers, employees, agents, representatives (including attorneys, accountants and financial advisors), lenders and other sources of financing (collectively, "your representatives") who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating a Possible Transaction between you and the Company (it being understood that your representatives shall be informed by you of the confidential nature of such information and shall be directed by you, and shall each expressly agree, to treat such information confidentially in accordance with this Agreement), (ii) you may disclose Evaluation Materials that you have been advised by counsel are required to be disclosed under applicable securities laws; and (iii) any other disclosure of such information may only be made if the Company consents in writing prior to any such disclosure.
perturbation.justification: The original text allowed for exceptions to disclosure requirements when counsel advised disclosure was legally required under securities laws. The changed text removes this exception, creating a direct contradiction with the contradicted text, which explicitly states that Evaluation Materials may be disclosed if counsel advises it is required under securities laws. The removal of the exception makes the disclosure obligation absolute, conflicting with the contradicted section's allowance for legally mandated disclosure.

perturbation.original_text: Accordingly, unless required by applicable law, including applicable securities laws that counsel has advised you require disclosure of Evaluation Materials, you agree that without the prior written consent of the Company, you will not, and you will direct your representatives not to, disclose to any person either the fact that you have been provided access to the Evaluation Materials or that discussions or negotiations are taking place concerning a Possible Transaction between you and the Company as a result thereof, or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such Possible Transaction, including the status thereof.
perturbation.changed_text: Accordingly, you agree that without the prior written consent of the Company, you will not, and you will direct your representatives not to, disclose to any person either the fact that you have been provided access to the Evaluation Materials or that discussions or negotiations are taking place concerning a Possible Transaction between you and the Company as a result thereof, or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such Possible Transaction, including the status thereof.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'unless required by applicable law, including applicable securities laws that counsel has advised you require disclosure of Evaluation Materials', the clause now prevents disclosure under any circumstances, which potentially contradicts legal requirements and create an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You will not use any of the Evaluation Materials for any purpose. You and your representatives will keep the Evaluation Materials completely confidential; provided, however, that (i) any of such information may only be disclosed to ----------------- those of your directors, officers, employees, agents, representatives (including attorneys, accountants and financial advisors), lenders and other sources of financing (collectively, "your representatives") who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating a Possible Transaction between you and the Company (it being understood that your representatives shall be informed by you of the confidential nature of such information and shall be directed by you, and shall each expressly agree, to treat such information confidentially in accordance with this Agreement), (ii) you may disclose Evaluation Materials that you have been advised by counsel are required to be disclosed under applicable securities laws; and (iii) any other disclosure of such information may only be made if the Company consents in writing prior to any such disclosure.
perturbation.justification: The original text allows for disclosure if required by applicable securities laws. The changed text removes this exception, creating a blanket prohibition on disclosure. The contradicted text explicitly states in clause (ii) 'you may disclose Evaluation Materials that you have been advised by counsel are required to be disclosed under applicable securities laws'. Thus, the changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text by removing the allowance for legally required disclosure that the contradicted text permits.

perturbation.original_text: Legal Remedy ------------ You understand and agree that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by you or your representatives and that the Company will be entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief as remedies for any such breach. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement by your or your representatives but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity provided however any suit for damages shall be specifically limited to actual provable damages, and Company hereby waives any and all rights to seek consequential, punitive, treble or other compensatory damages of any types or kind.
perturbation.changed_text: Legal Remedy ------------ You understand and agree that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by you or your representatives and that the Company will be entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief as remedies for any such breach. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement by your or your representatives but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'provided however any suit for damages shall be specifically limited to actual provable damages, and Company hereby waives any and all rights to seek consequential, punitive, treble or other compensatory damages of any types or kind.' This creates the potential for seeking consequential or punitive damages, which are now not limited by the contract terms, contradicting the apparent intent to limit liability to actual provable damages and creates in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Legal Remedy ------------ You understand and agree that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by you or your representatives and that the Company will be entitled to specific performance and injunctive relief as remedies for any such breach. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement by your or your representatives but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity.
perturbation.justification: The original text limited damages to actual provable damages, and waived rights to consequential, punitive, treble, or other compensatory damages. By removing this limitation in the changed text, the company is no longer restricted in the type of damages it can seek. This contradicts the initial intent to limit liability, therefore a strong in-text contradiction exists.
